name: MSI MPG B850 EDGE TI WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8400(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 20Gbps Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (MPGB850EDGETIWIFI)
shortName: MSI MPG B850 EDGE TI WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: High-performance ATX motherboard for AMD AM5 with B850 chipset, DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 7 for gaming enthusiasts.
